ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "awardee_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the awardee organization */,
  "cid" TEXT /* Unique project identifier from the government database */,
  "subprogram_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the subprogram under which the project falls */,
  "subprogram_node" TEXT /* Node reference for the project */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award provided */,
  "foa_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding opportunity announcement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the award */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the award */,
  "total_government_share" REAL /* Total amount of government funding received */,
  "cost_share" REAL /* Additional cost share from awardee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the project is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the project is based */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the project location */,
  "node" TEXT /* Node reference for data aggregation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the project */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the project */,
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project goals and outcomes */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the project */,
  "funding_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding officially starts */,
  "funding_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding officially ends */,
  "budget_overview" TEXT /* A brief overview of the project budget */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* Key milestones and deliverables of the project */,
  "research_areas" TEXT /* Specific areas of research within the project */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's official page or documentation */,
  "impact_statement" TEXT /* A statement describing the potential impact of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES project_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_awardee_id FOREIGN KEY ("awardee_id") REFERENCES awardees ("awardee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_pi_id FOREIGN KEY ("pi_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_subprogram_id FOREIGN KEY ("subprogram_id") REFERENCES subprograms ("subprogram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_foa_name FOREIGN KEY ("foa_name") REFERENCES foas ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "awardees" (
  "awardee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each awardee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the organization's address */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the awardee's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the awardee */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the physical address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the physical address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was established */,
  "total_funding_received" REAL /* Total funding received by the awardee across all projects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("awardee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subprograms" (
  "subprogram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subprogram */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subprogram */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subprogram */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the subprogram */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subprogram */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subprogram */,
  "lead_agency" TEXT /* The lead agency responsible for the subprogram */,
  "coordinating_agencies" TEXT /* Other agencies involved in the subprogram */,
  "program_goals" TEXT /* Goals and objectives of the subprogram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subprogram_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foas" (
  "foa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FOA */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the FOA */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the FOA */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FOA */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility to apply for the FOA */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "review_process" TEXT /* Description of the review process for applications */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total funding amount available for the FOA */,
  "funding_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the funding period */,
  "funding_end_date" TEXT /* End date for the funding period */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the FOA */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the FOA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the investigator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the investigator */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the investigator in the organization */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Areas of research interests of the investigator */,
  "projects_led" INTEGER /* Number of projects led by the investigator */,
  "publications" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the project status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation in the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated project */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the project is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the project is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the project location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the project */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the project */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the physical address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the physical address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_locations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_shares" (
  "cost_share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost share entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated project */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cost share contributed by the awardee */,
  "funding_period" TEXT /* Period for which the cost share is applicable */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the cost share funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_shares_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government share entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated project */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of government funding received */,
  "funding_period" TEXT /* Period for which the government share is applicable */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the government funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_shares_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated project */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, proposal) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the document */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who last modified the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accessed project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the project */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
